use_cases: Hero section background for tech and developer-focused landing pages
Splash screen or loading page background with cyberpunk aesthetic
Full-screen background effect for gaming platform interfaces
Decorative background for developer tool documentation sites
Ambient visual effect for tech conference or hackathon event pages
ai_summary: A canvas-based Matrix-style falling character animation that creates a digital rain effect on a dark background. The component features customizable font size, character set, color, fade opacity, and animation speed. Designed as a background effect for hero sections and landing pages with a cyberpunk or developer aesthetic, it automatically resizes to fill the viewport and runs as continuous ambient animation.
